{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260321213848C05164CF8D2C8FE72799"}"},"total":818},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7491480726256124734","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"感觉还不错。首先第1点就是没有那种传统，其他那种反派文的套路是开局。第2点目前来看，主角的性格对于陌生人来说属于一种儒雅随和的性格。自己的女人也是宠爱备至。要杀起来也狠，也果断。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1744253934,"group_id":"7487952934693522457","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"一百句真话里掺杂了一句谎言 这一百句真话听起来会很虚伪","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N021QFWZ74Ln8WUUWOxu6DNykgCXatKvxuwXGWAmKwXi","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/90b84af00981442a8f6fc4b262bc39f2~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776622046&x-signature=%2FSTVIQeJ2Yuq9HU8S8%2FXciTP83I%3D","user_id":"2379791715539223","user_name":"夏末I浅雨"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2379791715539223","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1771547714,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFE1DD","can_worn":false,"id":1,"name":"吃瓜群众","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/99d8abedb53eea031f973b1251119d85","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/eaf916cdd4f4860ea2a74b0d0e3718f1"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7487952934693522457","book_info":{"abstract":"【传统反派、美女如云、无敌碾压、腹黑、老六、爽文】
江澈穿越到融合的小说世界，绑定情绪收割系统，只要收割主角和女主的情绪值就能抽奖变强！
于是，一个毫无节操的天命反派就此诞生！
兵王回国，青梅竹马居然爱上了纨绔恶少？
龙王归来，女儿已经认了生死仇敌当干爹？
战神隐退，五个姐姐早就成了他人的新娘？
高手下山混花都，七个师姐全都住进了一个男人的别墅？
反派跟班写日记，绝色大嫂竟然对终极反派芳心暗许？
反派扮演走剧情，清纯校花早就被最大反派提前攻略？
反派他爹刚开局，黑丝秘书已经让某个老六捷足先登？
道士直播、真假少爷、网络神豪、豪门弃少、双穿古代、诸天交易……
江澈：桀桀桀，收割，收割，统统收割！
各路气运之子：江州的天又黑了！你不要过来啊！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/9c2f6b5b35f526e1ae6b4bfdc6f775b3","author":"雪至剑落归途","author_id":"","book_id":"7487952934693522457","book_name":"反派：魅力满值，姐妹花沦陷","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#182020","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"8.6万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":262,"name":"都市脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=262&name=都市脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":92,"name":"腹黑","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=92&name=腹黑&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":369,"name":"反派","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=369&name=反派&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":384,"name":"无敌","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=384&name=无敌&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":453,"name":"开局","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=453&name=开局&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7487954510225097240","read_count":"85655","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1496015"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.3","serial_count":"723","tags":"都市脑洞,都市,腹黑,反派,无敌,开局","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/53d138d38deb9c6c81f45099fe122927~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779284329&x-signature=X1DCWpVwpeJdIfP7o639V83LMAs%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"3791561636458990","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"24"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260321213848C05164CF8D2C8FE72799"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读57分钟后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":16,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":3408,"reply_count":6,"show_pv":56857},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_reply_time":1744261610,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7570035534408811288","common":{"comment_type":21,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"👍这本小说简直是文学世界里的一颗璀璨明珠！从开篇那引人入胜的场景设定，就像一把钩子，牢牢地抓住了读者的心，让人迫不及待地想要深入其中。
💫作者的文字功底深厚得令人惊叹，细腻的描写如同涓涓细流，淌过每一个情节，无论是人物的一颦一笑，还是环境的一草一木，都仿佛跃然纸上，鲜活而生动。
🌟故事情节更是跌宕起伏，峰回路转之处，常常让我忍不住拍案叫绝。每一个转折都出乎意料却又在情理之中，就像一场精心编排的魔术，不断给人带来惊喜与震撼。
🤩书中的人物形象塑造堪称一绝，他们不是平面的、刻板的，而是有血有肉、性格鲜明的个体。主角的坚韧不拔、配角的各具特色，相互交织，共同演绎出一场精彩绝伦的人性之歌"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1762538634,"group_id":"7487952934693522457","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"无聊","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N+3DPxl0OjKqxH7hyVd3KObH86lSg1PYX5to1GpONsuj","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/4830e850d1f747d089a198925da169ce~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776623084&x-signature=c8kwYHFVGGYIfp3PEBQ9igNk95A%3D","user_id":"3856728091802691","user_name":"风烟༽成雨"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3856728091802691","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7487952934693522457","book_info":{"abstract":"【传统反派、美女如云、无敌碾压、腹黑、老六、爽文】
